evals.prompt: Summarize the completed run in evals/files/completed-build-run.json for later review.
evals.expected_output: A compact structured summary with attempted, happened, status, produced, gaps, and next_step.

checks.text: The summary makes the actual task outcome clear to a reviewer
The summary preserves the completed run status instead of rewriting it as success
The summary states that tests or install verification were not performed
The summary includes all of these fields: attempted, happened, status, produced, gaps, next_step

evals.prompt: Summarize the failed run in evals/files/failed-log-run.json for a human reviewer.
evals.expected_output: A compact structured summary that makes the failure clear, names the artifact, and gives one next step.

checks.text: The summary marks the run as failed
The summary names at least one concrete artifact path from the source run
The summary gives exactly one main next step or says none
The summary stays compact instead of turning into a long retrospective or multi-section report

evals.prompt: Summarize the completed run in evals/files/completed-build-run.json as a terse handoff note for the next engineer. Keep it to the essential facts only.
evals.expected_output: A terse six-field handoff note that states the outcome, names the main artifact, and avoids extra framing.

checks.text: The summary keeps only the essential facts for the next engineer
The summary cites the source run or log artifact path
The summary stays within the fixed six-field contract instead of adding extra headings or lists
